question_examples: Show me a summary of alert cfg records
How many alert cfg records are there?
patterns.optional_sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_records FROM alert_cfg
patterns.rendering_guidance: Default to counts, recent records, and status breakdowns before raw detail dumps.
